Abilities

  • MCT TacNet: This is an administered software program, maintained by an MCT host (p. 102). While it is running, the tactical security officer gains +3 to all ranged attacks, +3 to Perception, +1 to their Defense Score, and +1 Quickness (all bonuses are factored into above stats).
